# GitHub Copilot Instructions for insta

## Project Overview

insta is a snapshot testing (approval testing) library for Rust. It provides macros like `assert_debug_snapshot!`, `assert_yaml_snapshot!`, and `assert_json_snapshot!` that compare values against stored reference snapshots. The companion CLI `cargo-insta` enables interactive review of snapshot changes.

## Workspace Structure

- `insta/` â€” Core library crate with assertion macros, snapshot runtime, serialization, and redaction support
- `cargo-insta/` â€” CLI companion tool for running tests and interactively reviewing snapshot changes
- `vscode-insta/` â€” VS Code extension for `.snap` file syntax highlighting and snapshot review

## Build and Test

```sh
cargo build --all-features          # Build everything
make test                           # Run full test matrix
cargo test -p insta --all-features  # Test core library with all features
cargo test -p cargo-insta           # Test CLI tool
cargo fmt --all                     # Format code
cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- --deny warnings  # Lint
```

## Code Style

- Standard Rust conventions: `snake_case` for functions, `CamelCase` for types
- All public items need doc comments
- Use `Result`/`Option` â€” no `unwrap()` in library code
- Feature-gated code with `#[cfg(feature = "...")]`
- Lints enforced: `clippy::doc_markdown`, `clippy::needless_raw_strings`
- MSRV: 1.66.0 for the `insta` crate

## Key Architecture Concepts

- Assertion macros in `macros.rs` capture `file!()`, `line!()`, `module_path!()` for snapshot naming
- `runtime.rs` performs snapshot comparison; behavior controlled by `INSTA_UPDATE` env var
- `snapshot.rs` handles `.snap` file format parsing and writing
- `settings.rs` provides thread-local configuration (redactions, filters, snapshot paths)
- `content/` module is an intermediate representation for normalizing serialized data
- Redaction selectors use a PEG grammar in `select_grammar.pest`
- `cargo-insta` finds `.snap.new` / `.pending-snap` files and presents interactive review

## Feature Flags

`redactions`, `filters`, `glob`, `json`, `yaml`, `ron`, `csv`, `toml`, `colors` (default). Code must compile correctly with any combination of features enabled or disabled.

## Testing Guidelines

- Add integration tests to `cargo-insta/tests/main.rs` for cargo-insta changes
- Test with `--all-features` and `--no-default-features`
- Snapshot files live in `snapshots/` directories next to test files
- Do not add dependencies that break the MSRV
